lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Hello, I'm Laidee. Welcome to the Warriors' Guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: I'm here to guard the Warrior's Guild and determine who's qualified to enter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're Ghommal's replacement?

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: That I am. Ghommal and I used to adventure together before we joined the Guild. It felt only right that I take over from him. It is... strange not having him around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry for your loss. He was a great warrior.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: And an even greater friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here to talk about Combat Achievements.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you explain what they are?

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Combat Achievements are a set of tasks for all adventurers to try and accomplish. They range from simple missions to kill various creatures, to challenges that will push you to your limits.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: The purpose of these tasks is for you to grow and improve, experience all that Gielinor has to offer, and become stronger in the process.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Is this something that sounds interesting to you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, tell me about Combat Achievements.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Combat Achievements are broken down into six tiers: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite, Master and Grandmaster.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: As you complete tasks, you'll earn points. Tasks in higher tiers give more points than easier tasks. Your rank depends on how many points you've earned.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Whenever new tasks are added to the list, there are more points available to earn, so the threshold needed for each rank will increase. Keep completing tasks to maintain your rank!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: I'd recommend you go kill some monsters. Come back to me when you've completed a tier or two. I'll reward you for your efforts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks a lot, I'll get going.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not at the moment, no.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I reclaim some rewards?

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like you to customize my Slayer helmet.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: You don't appear to have any regular Slayer Helmets in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here to talk about Combat Achievements.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've completed a combat tier!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Oh, how have you been getting on?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed some more Combat Achievement tasks!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your easy rewards?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: You need at least 2 inventory spaces. Make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: There you go. I've provided you with the most basic of our ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining easy clues, increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, bonus tokens from the

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Warrior guild and an extra commendation point from each Pest Control game.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed some more Combat Achievement tasks!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your medium rewards?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: You need at least 2 inventory spaces. Make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: There you go. I've provided you with one of our more modest ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining medium clues, increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, bonus tokens

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: from the Warrior guild and two extra commendation points from each Pest Control game. Additionally, equipping one of my sword hilts at the Barrows will prevent your prayer points from being drained and

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: your Dwarf multicannon can hold five extra cannonballs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed some more Combat Achievement tasks!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your hard rewards?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: You need at least 2 inventory spaces. Make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: There you go. I've provided you with one of our sturdier ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining hard clues and have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks. You will

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: also have to kill fewer God Wars minions to access the generals, get more common ecumenical keys, gain access to our most expensive private God Wars rooms, receive a 50% discount on imbue rewards from the

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Nightmare Zone and Soul Wars, and gain three extra commendation points from each Pest Control game. Lastly, your Dwarf multicannon can hold 15 extra cannonballs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed some more Combat Achievement tasks!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your elite rewards?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: You need at least 2 inventory spaces. Make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: There you go. I've provided you with one of our fancier ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining elite clues, have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks and have a higher

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: chance of superior slayer creatures appearing. Plus, you'll have to kill even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals, receive even more common ecumenical keys and access to cheaper private God

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Wars rooms. Furthermore, your Dwarf multicannon can hold 30 extra cannonballs and your Bracelets of slaughter or Expeditious bracelets will have a chance to fully recharge instead of breaking! I can also customize

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: your Slayer helmet for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed some more Combat Achievement tasks!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: I can see that. You are clearly a very experienced adventurer. You'll be expecting your master rewards?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: You need at least 2 inventory spaces. Make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: There you go. I've provided you with one of our most prestigious ancient sword hilts, along with Ghommal's cherished lucky penny! You'll also have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks,

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: including the deadly TzHaar creatures, and have to kill even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals. Again, you'll get even more common ecumenical keys and access to even cheaper private God Wars rooms.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Furthermore, any Thralls you resurrect will last 100% longer. I can also customize your Slayer helmet even more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all the Combat Achievement tasks!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Wait, really?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! It took quite a long time. Some of those tasks were extremely challenging, but I persevered and finished them all!

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: You have come very far. You have earned these rewards.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: You need at least 2 inventory spaces. Make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: There you go. I've provided you with our most prestigious ancient sword hilt. You'll also have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, including the deadly TzHaar creatures, and have to kill

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals. Plus of course, you'll get even more common ecumenical keys and access to even cheaper private God Wars rooms. And yes, I can also customize your

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Slayer helmet even more.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: I do wonder what you will do now. Good luck, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you so much!

sections.title: Using a Slayer helmet on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you customise one of my Slayer Helmets?

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

sections.title: Using any other item on him

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: What do you expect me to do with this?

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Your gear is adequate, I'm impressed.

lines.speaker: Laidee Gnonock
lines.text: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!
